hero.title: Cross-Border Settlement and Treasury Coordination Through Licensed Partners
hero.subtitle: BTB coordinates international settlements, FX execution, and trade-payment operations across complex corridors.

globalSettlements.title: Global Settlements
globalSettlements.body: Coordinate cross-border payment flows and settlements through trusted infrastructure and licensed partners where applicable.

fxTreasury.title: FX & Treasury Coordination
fxTreasury.body: Support structured FX execution planning, treasury timing, and multi-currency operational flows.

tradeDealSupport.title: Trade & Deal Support
tradeDealSupport.body: Support cross-border trade-payment arrangements, commercial transaction coordination, and complex deal-related payment structures.

importersExporters.title: Importers / Exporters
importersExporters.body: Businesses managing international suppliers, buyers, and cross-border payment obligations.

cfosTreasury.title: CFOs / Treasury Teams
cfosTreasury.body: Companies requiring operational visibility, corridor planning, and structured multi-currency coordination.

internationalOperators.title: International Operators / Platforms
internationalOperators.body: Businesses with international flows that need reliable support across markets, counterparties, and jurisdictions.

privateInternational.title: Private International Cases
privateInternational.body: Selected private cross-border matters such as education support, family support, inheritance-related coordination, and international transfer structuring.

review.title: Review
review.body: Assess markets, currencies, timing, and operational requirements.

corridorMapping.title: Corridor Mapping
corridorMapping.body: Identify route logic and execution considerations.

partnerStructuring.title: Partner Structuring
partnerStructuring.body: Where regulated elements apply, execution is aligned through licensed partners.

executionSupport.title: Execution Support
executionSupport.body: Stay involved in coordination, communication, and process clarity.

hero.title: What We Deliver
hero.subtitle: BTB coordinates international settlements, FX execution, and trade-payment operations in cooperation with trusted licensed partners.

globalSettlements.title: Global Settlements
globalSettlements.overview: Cross-border settlements executed through regulated channels. Support multi-currency B2B payments across key trade corridors in Europe, Latin America, the Middle East, and Asia.
globalSettlements.bestFor: Importers / exporters; international businesses; multi-jurisdiction operating groups.
keyCapabilities: Same-day / next-day execution in many corridors
Settlement structuring aligned to regulated processes
globalSettlements.typicalExample: International supplier payment coordination across more than one country and currency.

fxTreasury.title: FX Execution & Treasury Coordination
fxTreasury.overview: Better currency execution, timing, and control across jurisdictions. Help finance teams manage currency flows efficiently.
fxTreasury.bestFor: CFOs; treasury managers; finance departments; companies with recurring multi-currency exposure.
keyCapabilities: Hedging support through partner solutions where available

tradeSupport.title: Trade & Deal Support
tradeSupport.overview: Execution support for coordination, documentation, timing, and operational details around international trade payments.
tradeSupport.bestFor: Trade operators; dealmakers; platforms / integrators; businesses with complex commercial transactions.
keyCapabilities: Currency exposure planning tied to settlement milestones
Payment timing aligned to trade milestones

hero.title: About BTB
hero.description: EU-based financial coordination for international settlements, FX, and cross-border trade — coordinated through licensed partners.

euBased.title: EU-Based

partnerLed.body: BTB coordinates access and execution support through trusted licensed financial partners where applicable.

complianceFirst.title: Compliance-First
complianceFirst.body: Operational discipline and regulated-partner alignment are built into the process.

operationalClarity.title: Operational Clarity
operationalClarity.body: Defined steps, visibility, and cross-border process structure.

directSupport.title: Direct Support
directSupport.body: Practical, human communication throughout the process.

crossBorderPrecision.title: Cross-Border Precision
crossBorderPrecision.body: Attention to corridor realities, timing, counterparties, and documentation.

structuredCoordination.title: Structured Coordination
structuredCoordination.body: A disciplined model for handling complex operational flows.

operate.regions: European Union — Israel — Turkey — UAE — Latin America
